notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Byron Buxton out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Trevor Larnach out at 2nd. Josh Bell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin flies out to right fielder Luke Raley.

notableEvents.label: Victor Caratini pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Victor Caratini singles on a ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena, deflected by shortstop J.P. Crawford. James Outman scores.

notableEvents.label: Austin Martin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Martin pops out to shortstop J.P. Crawford.
